title: tiquilia canescens
intro: Tiquilia canescens, also known as Grayhead Sneezeweed or Grayhead Tiquilia, is a flowering plant species in the borage family. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as colds, coughs, and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and relieving congestion, making it a natural remedy for respiratory problems. Tiquilia canescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
